hero_subtitle: SFTY structures and routes alerts and risk signals into standardized compliance workflows that preserve evidence and maintain audit-ready decision logs for digital asset teams.

trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk

problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to unify alerts and risk signals from multiple providers into a consistent review process. This leads to manual case creation, inconsistent triage and weak audit-ready decision records across monitoring workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects alerts and risk signals from multiple providers into one unified workflow that automates case creation, review routing, decision logging and evidence preservation for compliance teams.
workflow_title: From alerts to structured compliance cases
workflow_description: SFTY organizes monitoring alerts and risk signals into rule-based reviews leading to case creation, decision logging, evidence preservation and audit-ready reporting.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented alerts. One compliance control
why_sfty_description: SFTY transforms disconnected monitoring signals into standardized workflows, audit-ready decisions, case evidence and regulatory reporting for clearer and more efficient compliance operations.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow

authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance operations?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance control layer that connects provider outputs into standardized workflows, helping digital asset businesses manage alerts, cases, decisions and regulatory updates efficiently.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY standardize monitoring workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY applies internal policies to alerts and risk signals, automates case creation, routes reviews, and records decisions to deliver consistent monitoring workflows across multiple compliance data sources.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history and supporting evidence to support audit-ready records, enabling compliance teams to demonstrate review actions and traceability during internal or external audits.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, integrating their outputs into one operational compliance workflow without replacing existing tools.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT, or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY complements existing providers by structuring their outputs into workflows, cases, evidence and reports rather than replacing underlying KYC, KYT, or Travel Rule services.
final_title: Standardize monitoring workflows into audit-ready cases
final_description: Review how SFTY structures alerts and risk signals into controlled workflows with decision logs and evidence preservation.
